title: Argentinian Seitan Stew
description: A hearty, comforting stew made with argentinian beef, seitan, and gentle vegetables.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced potatoes and carrots, and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the argentinian seitan and cook until browned on all sides.
Pour in the vegetable broth, tomato paste, and spices (if using).
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste, then serve hot.
